response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via open-source GIS platforms, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or map tile pipelines, and his recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent tooling, which raises concerns about his readiness for the core C++-centric, low-latency geospatial routing demands of the role.
strengths: Built and maintained open-source geospatial platforms (GISCollective, Open Green Map) with real-world usage.
Demonstrated ability to work across stacks and adopt new technologies (DLang, Node.js, Docker, Kubernetes).
Strong track record of testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices (TDD, code katas, workshops).
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tile systems as required.
Recent roles emphasize web/TypeScript/AI-agent tools, not low-latency distributed geospatial pipelines.
Lacks clear evidence of fault-tolerant distributed systems or real-time traffic integration in production.
